title: Bộ Quần Áo Bóng Rổ Hồ Đá Vàng Xanh X24-BR-009
prompt:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: square WooCommerce product image for mayaobongro.vn

Image 1 is a garment-design reference only. Preserve the yellow upper body, green gradient lower body, layered mountain/forest motif, small red star, and HDR badge if readable. Replace HỒ ĐÁ RUNNERS text with HỒ ĐÁ or HĐR HOOPS. Remove mayaochaybo.vn, hotline, old running/lake road context, adult models, and running-shirt cut.

Convert the garment into an authentic basketball uniform: wider basketball shoulders, rib-knit neckline and armholes, relaxed straight torso, longer hem covering the shorts waistband. Pair it with loose knee-length basketball shorts coordinated in yellow, green, teal, and mountain motif panels.

Scene: covered elementary school basketball court, soft daylight, generic hoop visible, no readable school identity.

Subject: One fictional Vietnamese elementary-school basketball player, age 9-10, natural child proportions, friendly confident expression, holding a basketball at waist height.

Composition: Square 1:1, three-quarter body, garment fully visible, thumbnail-readable front design and coordinated shorts.

Style: Photorealistic commercial Vietnamese school sportswear photography, realistic breathable mesh, natural folds, correct anatomy.

Constraints: fictional student only, age-appropriate, non-sexualized, no exposed midriff, no real school identifiers, no extra logos, no running terminology, no watermark.
